build: tsc -b && vite build → success, 0 TS errors

new_types: TeamChallenge = { id, title, targetCount, themeEmoji, startDate, endDate }
store_changes.migrate: v1 → v2: inject goalType='weight' on existing members, init celebratedMemberIds=[], teamChallenge=null
store_changes.celebration_reset_policy: If updateMember drops member below 100% (or target invalid), the id is removed from celebratedMemberIds so a re-achievement re-triggers the modal. Documented in CelebrationModal.tsx.

changes: Member.goalType added (radio with 체중/체지방량/골격근량 in GoalsPage)
Default unit suggestion (kg) on type change
MemberCard + ranking list show goalType badge
New '전체 순위' section: numbered badges 1, 2, 3, ... + name + goalType badge + score
Current user row highlighted with accent border
Desktop md: layout — My Score & Top 3 side-by-side; full ranking and chart full-width below

features_implemented.details: canvas-confetti burst (~2.5s) from both bottom corners + center modal '목표 달성! 🎉 {name}' with 측정유형 + 수치. App-level CelebrationWatcher subscribes to members, fires once per id, marks via store.markCelebrated.

recharts LineChart, last 7 days (incl. today), X-axis weekday + MM/DD, two series '팀 전체' (#0066FF) and '내 기록' (#9CA3AF), tooltip + legend, empty state '이번 주 기록이 없어요'. Placed under '전체 순위' on RankingPage.

GoalsPage top section: create form (title/targetCount/themeEmoji/startDate/endDate) → active card with progress bar (count/target · %), period MM/DD ~ MM/DD, delete with confirm. Progress = certifications within [startDate, endDate] / targetCount × 100, capped at 100. RankingPage shows compact ChallengeBadge above the My Score/Top 3 row.
Catch-all route '*' now renders NotFoundPage with 404 + '홈으로 돌아가기' CTA.
RankingPage uses max-w-5xl + md:grid md:grid-cols-2 md:gap-6 for My Score/Top 3, full-width sections for ranking list and weekly chart.

regression_check: ensureMemberForUser auto-creates with goalType='weight' & unit='kg' (was empty unit)
Cascade delete also clears celebratedMemberIds entry
known_issues: vite build warning: bundle > 500kB (recharts is the bulk). Not blocking.
Celebration trigger uses goalScore===100 strictly; floats that round to 100 also fire (consistent with score formula).
